{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Yerin's wings
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin's wings]] are a [[Divine Treasure]] gifted to her by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
